name: rentvine-mcp
description: Live access to your Rentvine property management data inside Claude.
long_description: Ask Claude about your Rentvine properties, leases, units, work orders, applications, inspections, and tenant balances. Data is read live from the Rentvine API using your own credentials.

api_key.title: Rentvine API Key
api_key.description: From Rentvine → Settings → Users, Roles & API

api_secret.title: Rentvine API Secret
api_secret.description: From Rentvine → Settings → Users, Roles & API

company.title: Rentvine Subdomain
company.description: The subdomain portion, e.g. 'acme' for acme.rentvine.com

tools.name: list_properties
tools.description: All properties with address, type, and active status

tools.name: list_leases
tools.description: All leases with tenant, rent, dates, and status

tools.name: list_units
tools.description: Units for a named property with vacancy and rent

tools.name: list_applications
tools.description: Rental applications with applicant and status

tools.name: list_inspections
tools.description: Maintenance inspections with date and inspector

tools.name: list_work_orders
tools.description: Work orders with status and priority

tools.name: get_tenant_balance
tools.description: Ledger balance for a named tenant

tools.name: list_attachments
tools.description: Files attached to any Rentvine object

tools.name: list_work_order_attachments
tools.description: Images and files attached to a work order

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Metadata for a single Rentvine file

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a Rentvine file as base64 (supports images)

tools.name: list_vendors
tools.description: All vendors with full contact, insurance, billing, and audit fields

tools.name: vendors_near
tools.description: Vendors within N miles of a property (ZIP-centroid approximation)

tools.name: get_vendor
tools.description: Full detail for a single vendor including code/code_metadata, website, and QuickBooks linkage
